name: lab03-smart-campus-testing
description: Lab 03 Postman and Mock Server Integration Testing

scripts.test:mock: npx newman run postman/collections/FIT4110_lab03_team-core.postman_collection.json -e postman/environments/FIT4110_lab03_team-core_mock.postman_environment.json -r cli,junit,htmlextra --reporter-junit-export reports/newman-report.xml --reporter-htmlextra-export reports/newman-report.html
